rag_rules: Place generated AGREE annex blocks in the target component implementation scope after subcomponents and connections
Use only visible identifiers in generated contracts; avoid subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Preserve AADL architecture by not modifying existing component structure or connections
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for declarations and comparisons
generic_rules: Insert annex blocks in the most specific valid scope to maintain encapsulation
Use only visible identifiers in contracts to ensure portability across implementations
Preserve existing component structure and connections during annex insertion
Align AGREE type declarations with the actual type of the expression
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators and implication for contract expressions
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not modify existing component structure or connections
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers in range comparisons
